name: Shanghai Huide Science & Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Shanghai Huide Science & Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, production, sale, and service of polyurethane (PU) resin for synthetic leather and polyester polyol in China. The company offers polyurethane resins, including dry coating, dry adhesive, wet process, dry two-component, dry foam type, wet nubuck, high peel strength, hydrolyzing resis and high peel strength, cold-resistant and non-yellowing, etc. It also exports its products to the Southeast Asia, Europe, the United States, and internationally. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Shanghai, China.
